chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2125 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 11542/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 11543/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 18.08.2025 Mr. Abrar Hussain, Advocate a/w Applicant ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Applicant Zafar Ali son of Shama Kharal is present along with his Counsel to seek protective bail to enable him to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No. 243/2012 of PS FIA AHT Circle, Karachi, under Section 17/22 of Emigration Ordinance, 1979 read with Section 420/468/471/10 PPC & Section 6 of P Act, 74, and police has shaken hands with complainant party and it is made difficult for applicant to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such he has appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, applicants above named are granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
